name: Fenugreek
summary: Saponins and fiber reduce glucose absorption and improve insulin sensitivity.
description: Saponins and fiber reduce glucose absorption and improve insulin sensitivity.
safetyNotes: GI discomfort, maple odor in sweat

sources.title: Integration of molecular docking, molecular dynamics and network pharmacology to explore the multi-target pharmacology of fenugreek against diabetes

dosage: 5-25 g seed powder OR 1 g extract
